name: io.github.JDoornink/k8gents
title: K8gentS — Kubernetes RCA MCP Server
description: Kubernetes RCA agent that sandboxes its own AI with OPA Gatekeeper. MCP-ready for any client.

environmentVariables.name: AI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key for LLM-powered root cause analysis

environmentVariables.name: KUBECONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to kubeconfig file. Omit to use in-cluster config or ~/.kube/config automatically.
